purpose: Describe when languages are appropriate for Imperium New Reality local IDE/tooling work.
default_rule: Pick the simplest language that satisfies safety, performance, integration and validation requirements.

validation: sample run with local handoff output
languages.owner_summary_ru: Питон — основная обвязка, сканеры, отчеты, быстрые прототипы.
languages.owner_summary_en: Python is the primary glue layer: scanners, reports, quick prototypes.

languages.owner_summary_ru: Node/JS — UI, bridge, Playwright и быстрое локальное web-tooling.
languages.owner_summary_en: Node/JS is for UI, bridge, Playwright and local web tooling.

languages.owner_summary_ru: TypeScript нужен там, где JS уже становится опасно менять вслепую.
languages.owner_summary_en: TypeScript is used when JavaScript grows too risky to refactor blindly.

languages.owner_summary_ru: Rust — кандидат для быстрых безопасных индексаторов/сканеров и нативных CLI.
languages.owner_summary_en: Rust is a candidate for fast safe indexers/scanners and native CLI tools.

languages.owner_summary_ru: Go — кандидат для локальных сервисов, watcher-ов и простых concurrent daemon-ов.
languages.owner_summary_en: Go is a candidate for local services, watchers and simple concurrent daemons.

languages.owner_summary_ru: C++ — только для настоящего native/performance ядра, не для обычной обвязки.
languages.owner_summary_en: C++ is reserved for true native/performance core work, not ordinary glue.

avoid_for: source of truth without migration plan
languages.owner_summary_ru: SQLite/SQL нужен для локального индексируемого знания и быстрых запросов к Атласу.
languages.owner_summary_en: SQLite/SQL is for local queryable knowledge and fast Atlas queries.

validation: no source rewrite except copy payload
languages.owner_summary_ru: PowerShell — тонкая операторская оболочка. Не переписывать им UTF-8 source.
languages.owner_summary_en: PowerShell is a thin operator wrapper. Do not rewrite UTF-8 source with it.

admission_gate.ru: Новый язык допускается только если Python/Node не подходят, есть понятная задача, build/run recipe, validation path, паспорт и owner-visible выгода.
admission_gate.en: A new language is admitted only if Python/Node are insufficient and there is a clear task, build/run recipe, validation path, passport and owner-visible benefit.
